title: #2.15: Coca Contraception
description: The irreproducibility crisis is at large! And Mark has noticed. He aims to correct the wrongs of two percent of scientists by exposing their misdeeds. We start out with a paper that actually points fingers. How Coke doesn't kill cum. Flemming doesn't want to talk about his own overcompensating, so instead he turns to dogs. And he brings in an expert in animal science. Robin has the trivia for you next party all under control. You don't have to think about nothing! After this episode, you'll vomit knowledge about superconductors! Buy our merch!
